mapper.sql: A.NIP_HOST_MST_SEQ, A.SIP_HOST_TYPE_CD, A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ, A.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD, A.SPRORITY_YN, A.SPORTID, A.NLGIPPORTSEQ , A.SIP_IF_NM, A.SNESCODE, A.SIP_HOST_NM, A.SRSSOFFICESCODE , A.SSAID, A.SLLNUM, A.SEX_SVC_CD, A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD , A.PIP_HOST_INET, A.SIP_BLOCK, A.SNETMASK, A.NFIRST_ADDR , A.SFIRST_IP_PREFERRED, A.SCOMMENT, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID , A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID, A.SMODELNAME
, A.SIP_HOST_TYPE_NM , A.SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD , A.SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_NM , A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , A.SRSSOFFICESNM , A.SEX_SVC_NM

, B.SIP_HOST_TYPE_NM AS SIP_HOST_TYPE_NM , B.SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD AS SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD , B.SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_NM AS SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_NM , C.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM AS SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM , D.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM AS SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , E.SLVL_NM AS SRSSOFFICESNM , (SELECT SIPMS_SVC_NM FROM MST.TB_IPMS_SVC_MST WHERE A.SEX_SVC_CD = SEX_SVC_CD LIMIT 1) AS SEX_SVC_NM

, ( SELECT G.SIP_HOST_TYPE_CD, G.SIP_HOST_TYPE_NM, H.SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD, H.SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_NM FROM MST.TB_IP_HOST_TYPE_CD G , MST.TB_EXTERNAL_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD H WHERE G.SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD = H.SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD ) B , MST.TB_IP_VERSION_TYPE_CD C , MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD D , MST.TB_LVL_CD E
AND A.SIP_HOST_TYPE_CD = B.SIP_HOST_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = C.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD = D.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SRSSOFFICESCODE = E.SLVL_CD(+)

choose.when:
ORDER BY A.PIP_HOST_INET
ASC
DESC
ASC

ORDER BY A.DMODIFY_DT
ASC
DESC
ASC

mapper.select:
SELECT NIP_HOST_MST_SEQ , PIP_HOST_INET , E.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ , MM.SIP_BLOCK , SIP_HOST_TYPE_NM , SLVL_NM AS SRSSOFFICESNM , SIP_HOST_NM AS SIP_HOST_NM , SIP_IF_NM AS SIP_IF_NM , MM.SMODELNAME AS SMODELNAME , S1.SSVC_MGROUP_NM , S2.SSVC_LGROUP_NM , S3.SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM , D.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM AS SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , MM.SSAID AS SSAID , MM.SLLNUM AS SLLNUM
FROM ( SELECT NIP_HOST_MST_SEQ , PIP_HOST_INET , SIP_BLOCK , B.SIP_HOST_TYPE_NM , C.SLVL_NM , SIP_HOST_NM , SIP_IF_NM , SMODELNAME , A.SSAID , A.SLLNUM , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , A.SEX_SVC_CD , A.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ , A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ FROM MST.TB_IP_HOST_MST A , MST.TB_IP_HOST_TYPE_CD B , MST.TB_LVL_CD C WHERE A.SPRORITY_YN = 'Y'
AND A.SIP_BLOCK = (SELECT BIF.UF_SEARCH_IP_TO_IP(#{searchWrd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS SIP FROM DUAL)
AND A.SSAID ILIKE '%' || #{ssaid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
AND A.SLLNUM ILIKE '%' || #{sllnum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
AND A.SIP_HOST_TYPE_CD = B.SIP_HOST_TYPE_CD AND A.SRSSOFFICESCODE = C.SLVL_CD(+)
) MM , MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD D , MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST E , MST.TB_IPMS_SVC_MST S , MST.TB_SVC_MGROUP_CD S1 , MST.TB_SVC_LGROUP_CD S2 , MST.TB_SVC_USE_TYPE_CD S3 WHERE 1=1
AND MM.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD = D.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD(+) AND MM.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = E.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ(+) AND E.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ = S.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ(+) AND LEFT(MM.SEX_SVC_CD,6) = S1.SSVC_MGROUP_CD(+) AND RIGHT(MM.SEX_SVC_CD,6) = S2.SSVC_LGROUP_CD(+) AND S.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD = S3.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD(+) LIMIT 1
